Wang Hou
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Hou. Controlled supplies during a time when food was short, executed to appease the troops. Wang Hou is a fictional character. Wang Hou was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
